Knowledge Shelf — Sovereign PM

✦ Lessons Learned
◈ Project Chronicle

Project Charter

Select Charter Type
The charter type determines the default governance template. Select once — fields are pre-populated from your project context. You can edit all fields.

Project Phases

Phase Gates & Timeline
Each phase has a gate condition — the criterion that must be met before the phase may close. Multiple phases may be active simultaneously. Order numbers are for reporting sequence only, not activation prerequisites. Commitments assigned to a phase must be resolved before the phase can close.

PM Intelligence

Embedded knowledge · PM Mentor · PMBOK · Doctrine · Actors · Vessel House

Reports

Generated from vessel state · All data sovereign · No server required
One-page summary for clients, sponsors & boards · auto-composed from live state
◈
Weekly Progress Report
Commitments resolved this week, drift delta, overdue items, next 7 days, active phase status. Suitable for client submission or internal circulation.
Commitments People Phases Drift Gradient
—
⬡
Project Health Summary
Single-page snapshot: project identity, charter status, phase progress, people roster, risk register, drift gradient. The vessel in one document.
All vessel data Charter Phases Risk Register
—
≡
Commitment Audit Trail
Full ledger export — every commitment, its state, who made it, due date, resolution, drift note, and amendment history. The complete chain of custody.
Full Ledger Amendment Trail All People
—
◉
People Integrity Report
Per-person breakdown: commitment count, drift rate, integrity score, open workload, blocked items. Identifies who needs support and who is excelling.
People Commitments Drift Gradient
—
◈
Budget & Cost Summary
Contract value vs estimated vs actual spend. Resource register totals. Commitment-level cost variance. Phase spend breakdown. Budget variance at a glance.
Contract Value Resource Register Commitment Costs Phase Spend
—
⊞
WBS Delivery Report
Scope accountability by deliverable. Each WBS node with responsible person, linked commitments, completion status, and delivery integrity. Answers: is the scope being delivered?
WBS Commitments People Phases
—
⬡
BiBBOS Registry Snapshot
Lightweight JSON summary for import into the BiBBOS Project Registry. Vessel ID, health metrics, drift gradient, charter status, phase list. No sensitive ledger data.
Vessel Identity Health Metrics BiBBOS Handshake
—
⊟
Project Closeout Report
Full post-project record: identity, charter, phase timeline, final commitment state, lessons learned, handover details, and closing statement. Print-ready.
Full Ledger Lessons Learned Chronicle

Idle issue alerts
Alert on open issues with no progress after 3 days
Budget threshold alerts
Alert when committed spend reaches 80% of contract value
Reminder windows
Days before due date to surface upcoming commitments

Vessel Identity

◈ About this Vessel
▸
Sovereign PM — The Project House
A complete project management vessel. Single file. No server. No subscription. Yours. Built as part of the BiBBOS sovereign infrastructure ecosystem — formation channel integrated, intention pipeline live, one truth across all browser surfaces.
Design Principles
Commitment is the unit of truth. Everything connects back to what was promised by a named person with a date.
Drift is not failure. Undisclosed drift is. The ledger records what happened, not what was wished.
The vessel is the memory. The Chronicle, Lessons, Decision Log — the vessel outlasts the project.
Sovereignty is non-negotiable. No data leaves without the steward's explicit action.
The PM Mentor serves the steward. Intelligence surfaces patterns; the steward makes decisions.

Version History (selected milestones)
v2.3.5Approval guard simplified — vessel.status==='pending-approval' is sole guard; removed fragile _approvedAt secondary check. Stale heartbeat poisoning eliminated.
v2.3.4Revision/approval cycle fully fixed — _approvedAt cleared at revision, re-approval after revision works. Stale heartbeat guard added.
v2.3.3PHASE_TEMPLATES bridge IIFE moved post-declaration — ReferenceError eliminated. Charter templates for 10 new sectors.
v2.3.2Sector dropdown expanded 6→16 sectors. CHARTER_TEMPLATES: 14 sector templates with full governance structure.
v2.3Sovereign escalation contact — sovereignContact from BiBBOS heartbeat shown read-only in Vessel DNA. Mid-session re-commissioning modal sequencing fixed.
v2.2Full push event architecture — bibbos_intention_status push path for instant approve/revision/close. spm_plan_submitted push flips BiBBOS to pending-approval immediately. Stale entity eviction (90s). Two-tier vessel reset.
v2.1Pending intentions inbox — bibbos_new_intention push events populate amber card inbox. Accept → wizard pre-fill with vessel key, sector, budget.
v2.0Project House · People Pool · Programme Risks · Snapshot upgrade
v1.19PM Mentor (19 screens) · Lessons→Templates · Contract intelligence
v1.18Contract Register · Ably Network Intercom · Print infrastructure
v1.17Constellation · V2V Snapshots · P2P Intercom · Project Pulse
v1.16Multi-Capsule Reconciliation · Living Capsule · Project Broadcast
v1.14Field Capsule system — offline field data capture
v1.13Closing Protocol — Lessons · Closeout Instrument · Report
v1.12PMBOK Contextual Adviser · Phase Health · Decision categories
v1.0First stable release — themes · knowledge base · heartbeat
v0.1First vessel — Commitment Ledger · Composer · People · Dashboard
BiBBOS Ecosystem · Formation Channel
Sovereign PM is registered as sovereign-pm in the BiBBOS vessel registry. Related vessels: Field Capsule (spm-capsule), Recon Queue (spm-recon), The Masthead (bibbos-masthead).
Formation Channel: All three vessels communicate via BroadcastChannel('spm-formation') — zero infrastructure, same browser only. BiBBOS originates intentions and heartbeats every 15s. SPM submits plans and reports health. The Masthead logs all transitions as the sovereign witness.
bibbos_new_intention → SPM inbox (amber card) → Accept → wizard pre-fill
bibbos_intention_status → instant approve / revision / issue / complete
bibbos_formation_heartbeat → 15s sync · sovereignContact · planApproved per intention
bibbos_formation_departure → entity deleted → SPM evicts immediately
spm_plan_submitted → BiBBOS flips pending-approval instantly (no 15s wait)
spm_project_closed → BiBBOS intention → completed
spm_formation_heartbeat → health · confidence · phases · submission state
masthead_ping → requests fresh heartbeat from all vessels
Built across 50+ sessions · 2026-03-04 → 2026-03-13 · Formation pipeline confirmed sovereign

🌿 Thank you, Steward. Your continued support funds the next vessel, the next field worker, the next sovereign node. Every contribution is recorded in this vessel's Stewardship Record.
This vessel is free. No account. No subscription. No data leaves your device. When you download the file, all your project data travels with it — permanently.

If Sovereign PM has value to your project, your team, your field — a voluntary contribution keeps the ecosystem alive and funds new evolutions for communities across the region and beyond.
